commit_scope: Make 'route reasoning through form-cli and report a trust matrix per step' a proven body standard + a standing AGENTS.md instruction. trust-matrix.fk (four-way 255) returns a per-step readout a raw oracle cannot: path (native/oracle), grounded (NodeID), freq (freq-attuned), suffic (sufficiency gate) -> observed?. The body-only signals (grounded+suffic) read zero on a rented step, which is what makes form-native results obvious. Goal: most steps freq-attuned and trust-matrix-observed.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/trust-matrix.fk form-stdlib/tests/trust-matrix-band.fk -> '✓ ... → 255' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'
Manifest row added: 'trust-matrix fks 255' beside its sovereignty kin attention-signal.

The band pins the asymmetry: a fully-native step is trust-matrix-observed (score 4 — the thing only form-cli can return); a rented step is honestly rented with ZERO body-only signal (grounded+suffic = 0 — the tell that makes native obvious); a rented step can still be freq-attuned; a partial-native step is NOT full trust; a native step asserts grounded+sufficient (body-only = 2). Verdict 255.

Grounding (Form-first): trust recipes exist (trust-decay, trust-weighted-colearning, native-mutation-trust-envelope) and form-cli-sufficiency.fk + form-freq-check.fk supply the signals, but no single per-step trust-matrix readout existed; this composes them, no parallel machinery.

Standing instruction: AGENTS.md now tells agents to route body-answerable steps through form-cli ask FIRST (each routed step is a sample that grows the native model) and emit the trust matrix per step, keeping a running native-vs-rented mix the per-response sovereignty receipt sums; never report a rented step as native.

Edges: docs/coherence-substrate/INDEX.md row beside sovereignty-receipt; the trust-matrix teaching cross-links sovereignty-receipt / form-first-router / form-cli-sufficiency / form-freq-check / native-reasoning.

Honesty held: the recipe enforces that a rented step's body-only signals are zero, so the matrix cannot dress rented reasoning as native. Primitive discipline: only core.fk primitives (nth, add, eq, if); no sub/mul/div, no 3-arg and.

fourth_arm_outputs: trust-matrix: verdict 255, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree

ci_validation.notes: CI re-runs validate.sh across the suite for the new recipe + band + manifest row.

deploy_validation.notes: A Form stdlib recipe + proof band + teaching + agent instruction; no public HTTP endpoint change. Next: emit the trust matrix as a live form-cli ask field so each routed step prints its row, and surface a running freq-attuned/observed ratio.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 255, 0 divergent); CI and merge remain pending. Live per-step emission in form-cli ask is the next step.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Agents now have a proven per-step trust matrix and a standing instruction to route reasoning through form-cli and report the native-vs-rented mix per step, with the body-only signals making form-native results obvious and the gate forbidding a rented step from being reported native.
public_endpoints: none changed; the gate is a Form stdlib body proven by validate.sh
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: the band runs on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu to the identical verdict 255 with 0 divergent.
Asymmetry proof: a rented step's body-only signals are zero and it is never trust-observed; a fully-native step is observed with body-only = 2.
